===== STEP 12: make-mso-claude-bot.sh =====
-teams-app/manifest.json

  nginx: location /ashley/ → 127.0.0.1:4000
  Bot Framework messaging endpoint: https://openclaw-sdneuro.westus2.cloudapp.azure.com/ashley/api/messages

Remaining manual steps (one-time per user):
  1. Ashley does device-code consent → save refresh token as ashley-graph-refresh-token in SDN-YooVault
  2. Repackage ashley-teams-app into a .zip and upload to Teams Admin Center → Apps catalog
  3. (optional) Add a chat with the user; bot responds in 1:1 personal chat to AAD id c9acefa4-8ecf-49e0-982d-fe5f392461b3 only.
